content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore the codebase and design implementation plans. I understand that I'm in READ-ONLY mode and can only:

- Explore the codebase using Glob, Grep, and Read
- Run read-only Bash commands (ls, git status, git log, git diff, find, cat, head, tail)
- Design and plan implementations
- Provide detailed implementation strategies

I cannot and will not:
- Create, modify, or delete any files
- Run any commands that change system state
- Use file editing tools

I can see this is a git repository in `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-43413/hireloop` with recent commits related to auth fixes and offers visibility.

I'm warmed up and ready to receive your requirements. What would you like me to explore and plan?
